approvalSource: Steve approved unattended Foundation-only continuation with backlog P0 reality cleanup after lessons learned loop; keep real security work but move deferred/provider/approval/scary rows out of active blocker posture unless they are actually active.
scopeSummary: Build the P0 reality classifier/proof, update targeted misleading security/provider/runtime/exposure rows, preserve real P0 priority, close the card, and advance Current Sprint to SYSTEM-010.
constraints: Foundation-only; do not start Value Builder split.
Do not demote real security work to make the queue look clean.
No credential/key rotation, provider API calls, public edge exposure, Drive permission mutation, external writes, or sends.
Provider/approval/security rows can stay P0 if they clearly state owner, active posture, and next action.
Each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main.
